message:
test(core): comprehensive native_events test suite (28 tests, was 5)

Add 23 new tests covering: decode_wire_event for PaneCreated (with/without
cwd), PaneDestroyed, Hello minimal, invalid JSON, unknown type, invalid
base64, output truncation at MAX_OUTPUT_BYTES, small data preservation,
timestamp overflow (u64::MAX → i64::MAX), state change with serde defaults,
alt screen flag, empty string input, empty base64 output. NativeEventError
Display impls. NativeEventListener::bind for empty path, existing path, and
parent directory creation. Integration tests for multiple events on one
connection, invalid JSON line skipping, and shutdown flag stop behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
